query:
SELECT
        COALESCE(SUM(fc.size_bytes), 0) as "total_bytes!: i64",
        COUNT(fc.node_id)::BIGINT       as "file_count!: i64"
      FROM nodes n
      JOIN file_contents fc ON fc.node_id = n.id
      WHERE n.owner_user_id = $1
        AND n.deleted_at IS NULL
        AND n.status = 'active'
        AND fc.status = 'active'
